endpoint.description: Cloudflare API base URL. Defaults to https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4.

zoneId.description: Default Cloudflare Zone ID used when a request omits zone_id.

accountId.description: Default Cloudflare Account ID used for account-scoped access rules when a request omits account_id.

headers.description: Optional extra HTTP headers sent to Cloudflare.

skipTlsVerify.description: Skip TLS certificate verification (only for private/proxied gateways; not recommended for api.cloudflare.com).
